ValidationRule.description: Availability slot must fall within the Interview Stage start and end date window.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Interview_Stage__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Start_DateTime__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(End_DateTime__c)), OR( DATEVALUE(Start_DateTime__c) < Interview_Stage__r.Start_Date__c, DATEVALUE(End_DateTime__c) > Interview_Stage__r.End_Date__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Availability slot must fall within the Interview Stage's Start Date and End Date window.
